---
title: "Wisdom of the inner crowd benefits both face and voice matching"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Flanagan, E., Jones, A. L., & Gous, G."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Applied Cognitive Psychology"
volume: "1–9"
doi: "10.1002/acp.4133"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/krameretal2023.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
